upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yadA svapiti SAntAtmA tadA sarvaM nimIlati' (manu0 152) nimIlati pralIyate
'nimimIla narottamapriyA hftacandrA tamaseva kOmudI' (raGu0 837) netre nimimIla mamAretyarTaH
